top_signals.title: Trump’s visit a win for Turkey’s Erdogan, NATO tensions aside
top_signals.summary: The summit was a diplomatic success for Turkey, which wants to boost its stature within the bloc and also overcome longstanding issues with Washington.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
